title: chore: update app ecosystem and tier economics dashboards
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tuning the hive's instruments
gist.blurb: Polished up our internal dashboards for tracking the app ecosystem and tier economics. Just keeping a close eye on the garden's growth.
gist.summary: Updated internal dashboard configurations for monitoring the app ecosystem and tier economics.
gist.impact: Maintainers get improved visibility into platform usage and tier distribution metrics.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and the Monitor Robot analyzing charts. The robot's screen shows a bar chart, representing the updated economics and ecosystem dashboards.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot looking at glowing lime green (#ecf874) bar charts on a retro terminal screen. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot looking at glowing lime green (#ecf874) bar charts on a retro terminal screen. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
